title.en: In an instant, the two sides collided.

content.en:
"Yuan, what do you think I'm here for?"

The First Demon Venerable was very crazy at the moment, exuding a crazy killing intent all over his body.

He wanted to kill the First Elder, destroy the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and kill all his enemies.

He didn't want the Innate Origin Alliance to give birth to an enemy who could threaten him in the future.

Rumble!!!!

The First Demon Venerable slaughtered the First Elder, and each of them superimposed a variety of mythical bodies.

In an instant, the two sides collided.

With just one move, the First Elder was knocked flying, and his whole body was cracked, but an innate primordial treasure made him recover from his injuries quickly.

Then.

The First Elder also began to work hard, and also brought a little trouble to the First Demon Venerable.

"Yuan, you have also completed the Eternal Dao into three percent, breaking the realm!"

The First Demon Venerable was surprised.

"It's just a fluke to break through!" The first elder said: "My foundation is not as good as yours, and the eternal sequence to the realm of Dao rules is not as good as yours, but I also have hole cards, if I really work hard, I can still hit you hard!"

Moreover, this is the territory of my Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and even if you can kill me at the cost of heavy damage, you may not be able to escape.

Now.

There was already an elder secretly snooping here, and the First Demon Venerable frowned slightly.

If the First Elder didn't break through, he would be able to kill the First Elder without any injury, and he didn't need to pay too much price, even if all the Elders of the Innate Origin Alliance besieged him, he could kill them all.

But now it doesn't work, it's too risky.

After pondering deeply, the First Demon Venerable snorted coldly and turned to leave.

After the First Demon Venerable left, the First Elder breathed a sigh of relief.

"Fortunately, Elder Ye Tian brought back the Mythical Golden Grass, and I was lucky to break through again, otherwise this time it would be really dangerous!"

The First Elder Road.

However, the gap between his strength and the First Demon Venerable this time is even greater, and maybe the gap will get bigger and bigger in the future, until the First Demon Venerable will far surpass him.

"I can only count on Ye Tian, I hope that he can raise the Mythical Supreme Body to the ninth transformation, plus all his clones, together with me, he can still suppress the First Demon Venerable!"

However, he didn't know that Ye Tian had comprehended the rules of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao.

......

Human domain.

Ye Tian spied on the battle between the First Demon Venerable and the First Elder through the Innate Primordial Treasure.

"The strength of the First Elder is much lower than that of the First Demon Venerable!"

Ye Tian frowned.

However, he admitted that he had underestimated the First Demon Venerable before.

The First Demon Venerable has a supreme bloodline, which is equivalent to taking the path of supreme strength to the Dao, and he has also superimposed eleven supreme divine bodies, and all of them have cultivated to nine transformations, and they have also begun to become eternal to the Dao.

In terms of physical strength, the First Demon Venerable far surpassed him.

However, the First Demon Venerable's Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Realm turned out to be only one percent realm, which was lower than his realm.

However, in terms of overall strength, he has a big gap.

Even, he is still far from the first elder.

The top ten veterans are not at all a level compared to the first elders.

However, the gap between his strength and the first veteran is not very large.

Moreover, his Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao rules were still improving, and it was only a matter of time before he surpassed the First Elder in the future.

......

The threat of the First Demon Venerable has been removed for the time being, but it will definitely attack the Innate Origin Domain Alliance again in the future.

Ye Tian has been cultivating his Supreme Mythical Body, and now his cultivation has been promoted to the peak of the Mythical Dao Realm, only the Supreme Divine Body has not yet been promoted, so he naturally has to work hard to improve and strive to complete the seventh transformation.

Time flies.

With the help of the Legendary Blood Treasure and many resources, Ye Tian's Supreme Mythical Body made rapid progress.

Before you know it, millions of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's dragon scale mythical body finally transformed again, completing the seventh transformation, and his strength increased by a bit.

After that, his other mythical bodies also completed the seventh metamorphosis, and this breakthrough almost exhausted the various top-level resources he had collected, and countless ordinary resources were also consumed.

I have to say that the eighteen supreme mythical bodies are too resource-intensive.

This is still assisted by the legendary blood treasure, otherwise it would not be possible to do it at all.

......

Valley of Myths.

Ye Tian changed all the replica bodies, and his strength transformed, so he could find trouble with those mythical spirits that he couldn't deal with in the past.

And he collected a batch of resources back, including a large number of first-order supreme rule items and innate primordial treasures.

"Wait for a few million years of the Supreme Dao Era, I can go out again, with these resources, I should be able to complete the transformation of the Supreme Mythical Body nine times, and then go to the Eternal Dao Transformation!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before you know it, millions of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian successfully came out of the Valley of Mythology.

Of course, he still has a copy body to stay in the Valley of Myths and continue to collect resources.

"Back to the human domain!

Ye Tian was very excited, he had obtained too many resources and treasures this time.

Human domain.

Ye Tian is back.

Immediately, he used his eye of identification to identify all the treasures he had obtained.

After the identification, he was even more excited, there were too many good things.

"In the next few years, my strength will definitely improve by leaps and bounds!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Moreover, he is also sure that he will raise his wife and children to the limit of the Mythical Dao Realm, and improve their foundations, and even superimpose the Mythical Body.

Under normal circumstances, after breaking through to the Mythical Dao Realm, it is impossible to superimpose the Mythical Body.

But some innate primordial treasures can make them superimpose the body of mythology.

For example, Ye Tian had such an innate primordial treasure in his hand.

Innate Primordial Treasure Mythical Blood and Bone, integrated into the body, implanted with the blood of mythology, and trained into the second gate or even more mythical bodies, the limit is nine

In other words, this Mythical Blood Bone can allow the Mythical Dao Realm to superimpose nine Mythical Bodies.

The First Demon Venerable superimposed eleven supreme mythical bodies, and it was estimated that he had obtained a better innate primordial treasure, so he could do so.

And the mythical blood and bones are also very good, it seems that even the first elder is only nine mythical bodies.

Soon.

He called his wife to him, and his wife did not take the path of the strongest to the Dao, first let his wife superimpose a bunch of top mythical bodies, and after his wife's cultivation reached the limit of the mythical to the Dao realm, he would give them to his son and daughter, and let them superimpose the mythical bodies.

"Yue'er, this is the mythical blood and bones......"

Ye Tian talked about the role of the mythical blood bones, and Xiao Yue was extremely shocked.
